title: Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor
tagline: Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The St Thomas Syro Malabar Catholic International Shrine, Malayattoor (or Malayatoor Church or മലയാറ്റൂർ വി.
overview.description: The St Thomas Syro Malabar Catholic International Shrine, Malayattoor (or Malayatoor Church or മലയാറ്റൂർ വി. തോമാശ്ലീഹാ സീറോ-മലബാർ തീർത്ഥാടനപള്ളി) is one of the eleven international shrines in the world, situated in Malayattoor Angamaly, Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. The Malayatoor Church attracts many devotees not just India, but from all over the world. The church is associated with the evangelisation activity of St.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thottuva Dhanwanthari Temple
topPlaces.description: Thottuva Dhanwanthari temple is a Hindu temple located in Thottuva, Kerala, India. Thottuva temple is situated on the Perumbavoor- Kodanad route, at about one kilometre away from Thottuva junction in Koovapady panchayat at Ernakulam district.

topPlaces.name: Kodanad
topPlaces.description: Kodanad is a rural riverside village of Ernakulam district in Keralam, South India. It is 18 km from Angamaly.

topPlaces.name: Kodanad Abhayaranyam animal shelter and elephant training centre
topPlaces.description: Abhayaranyam is an animal shelter–mini zoo, which functions under the eco-tourism project of Kerala government. Located near to Kaprikad village in Kunnathunad taluk of Ernakulam district, the shelter was opened in 2011, with an aim to rehabilitate the animals in the Kodanad elephant training center, located two kilometers away.

image.alt: Kodanad Abhayaranyam animal shelter and elephant training centre

topPlaces.name: Malayattoor
topPlaces.description: Malayattoor is a village in Aluva taluk around 15 km (9 mi) northeast of Angamaly in Ernakulam District in the state of Kerala in South India. The name 'Malayattoor' is an amalgamation of the words mala (mountain), arr (river), and oore (place).

topPlaces.name: Cheranallur
topPlaces.description: Cheranallur is a suburb of Kochi city in the state of Kerala, India and lies on the banks of the Periyar River. According to tradition, the area was named by its earlier inhabitants who found this place very fertile and beautiful.

topPlaces.name: St. Antony's Church, Kodanad
topPlaces.description: St. Antony's Church, is a church in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kaprikkad
topPlaces.description: Kaprikad is a rural riverside village of Ernakulam district, Kerala, southern India. Kaprikad is situated on the south bank of Periyar river, about 42 kilometers east of Kochi.

topPlaces.name: Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva is situated on the banks of the Periyar river at Kalady of Ernakulam District in Kerala state in India. The Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple is one of the important temples in Cochin Kingdom.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor?
faq.a: Stays in Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saint Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Malayattoor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thottuva Dhanwanthari Temple, Kodanad, Kodanad Abhayaranyam animal shelter and elephant training centre, Malayattoor, Cheranallur.
